questionHtml: Suggest why there are so many different ways in which plastics can be classified. HDPE can, for example, be categorized thermoplastic, an addition polymer, having Resin Identification Code (RIC) 2, etc.
markschemeHtml:
«different classifications are appropriate for» different properties/applications/purposes

[1 mark]
